titleStmt.title: SII 16.132: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 132. (A.R. No. 674 of 1917.) KŌṬAPĀḌU, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the chāvaḍi.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhin, Kārtika śu. 12, corresponding to 1544 A.D. October 27, (Monday).

It records the remission of taxes such as śrōtriyam, kaṭṇam, kāṇike etc., payable to the palace by the mahājanas of Kōṭapāḍu and Kēsinēnipalle in Avuku-sīma and the grant of these villages as sarvamānya by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara China Timmayyadēva Mahārāju, son of Timmarāju, grandson of Rāmarāju and great-grandson of Āravīṭi Bukkarāju of Ātrēya-gōtra and Sōma-vaṁśa, under orders of the king. The donor is said to have held Avuku-sīma as his nāyaṅkara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1466 Agunēṭi krōdhisaṁvatsara
kā¨rttika śu 12 lu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādirāja para
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadāśivadēvarāyamahārāya
lu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulaipṛthivirā
jyaṁ sēyāgānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara sōmavaṁ
śādhīśvarulaina Ātrēyagōtra pavitṛlaina Ārevīṭi bū
kka rājuṁgāri prapautrulu rāmarājuṁgāri pravutṛ
lu tiṁmarājuṁgāri putṛlu cinatiṁmmayya dēvamahā
rājuluṁgāṁru yajanayājanaAdhyayānaAdhyāpaka
(dhyāpaka)dāna(dāna)pratigrahaṣaṭka¨rmaniratulaina kōṭipā
ṭi kēsinēnipallestitāĀśēṣa vidvanmahājanālakunnu yici
na dha¨rmaśāsanamu mā nāyaṁkarānakuṁcele Avuku
sīmalōni kōṭapāṭi kēsinēnipalle reṁḍu Agrahārā
lanunnu mīru nagarikiṁbeṭṭe śrōtriyamu kaṭnamu
kānike veṭṭivēmi sa¨rvamunnu sadāsivarāyala Āna
tini sa¨rvamānyamu cēstimi sahiraṇyōdakadānadhā
rāpū¨rvakamugānu dhāravōstimi trivācakamugānu
dhāravōstimi gāna mī putrapavutrapāraṁparyamu
gānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāyagānu mī kōṭapā
ḍu kēsinēnipalle reṁḍu Āgrahārālunnu sa¨rva
mānyamugānu Ānubhaviṁcēdi . yiṁduku
yevvaru tappinānu mānaṁlēnivāru . yēkaiva bhagi
nī lōkēsa¨rvēṣāmēva bhūbhājāṁ . na bhōjyā na ka
ragrāṁhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
